post.subject: Banking can be FUN!
post.body:
Yesterday I met my cousin in the city centre. I took out money from savings account i just got access to, then opened a current account and put the money in that account. He opened an account too and got credit card with £1000 credit limit. Both of us will not have to worry about money anymore for goin away! 

I found a shirt when we were out and I really wanna get it. Though he says he's definately gonna buy it (when he gets paid tomorrow). 

Tell me if I'm being stupid, but i really dont wanna get it if he's gonna get it too. We hang out a lot and I dont want us to have the same shirt on when we go out sometime. So I dont think Im gonna get it now. Its not fair. He's stubborn an a bit of an asshole sometimes... 

Im pretty happy at the min :D

children.body: His memory's shit - hopefully he'll forget!
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body: just get the damn shirt. you'll look groovy lol.
comments.author: hynde

comments.body: I got another shirt... Another FOUR shirts
comments.author: obsolete_mind
